perfectPractice.headline: You keep trash-talking the customer's current tool
reasons: This happened on 4 of your recent calls, and each time, the buyer chose not to go with you: [1][2][3][4]

In one call, you spoke with Nina Becker from Cobalt Finance. You said, 'Honestly, Microsoft Teams is bloated and slow.' After that, they decided not to move forward with you: [1]
